title: Two Furthest Houses With Different Colors
titleCn: 两栋颜色不同且距离最远的房子

testcases.input: colors = [1,1,1,6,1,1,1] Output: 3 Explanation: In the above image, color 1 is blue, and color 6 is red. The furthest two houses with different colors are house 0 and house 3. House 0 has color 1, and house 3 has color 6. The distance between them is abs(0 - 3) = 3. Note that houses 3 and 6 can also produce the optimal answer.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: In the above image, color 1 is blue, and color 6 is red. The furthest two houses with different colors are house 0 and house 3. House 0 has color 1, and house 3 has color 6. The distance between them is abs(0 - 3) = 3. Note that houses 3 and 6 can also produce the optimal answer.
